refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall update the worksite model within the customer-required timeliness (p95 ≤ 1.0 s) for operational use, ensuring data accuracy and timely delivery.
refined_fr.rationale: To meet the high safety criticality and operational effectiveness, the worksite model update must be timely and accurate, supporting decision-making and safety monitoring.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the 95th percentile latency of worksite model updates under representative operational scenarios and validate against the ≤ 1.0 s target.
sub_frs: FR1: Acquire real-time telemetry data from vehicles and sensors within the worksite.
FR2: Process and integrate telemetry data to update the worksite model accurately and efficiently.
FR3: Distribute updated worksite model data to relevant modules and stakeholders within the required latency.

candidate_dps: DP1: Real-time telemetry data acquisition subsystem
DP2: High-performance data processing and model update engine
DP3: Low-latency data distribution and notification mechanism
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Real-time telemetry data acquisition subsystem; DP2: High-performance data processing and model update engine; DP3: Low-latency data distribution and notification mechanism

potential_sources: Telemetry data dependency between DP1 and DP2
Data distribution interface dependency between DP2 and DP3
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically coupled but maintain clear separation of concerns and interfaces, minimizing tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes telemetry data is reliably available within network constraints.
Risk of processing delays impacting update latency if data volumes spike.
Risk of network link failures affecting distribution timeliness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor data volume and network performance; consider fallback or buffering strategies in DP2 and DP3.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for telemetry acquisition, processing, and worksite model update distribution

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time telemetry data from Vehicle modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data communication between NGHE Solution and Vehicle, Teleoperation, and Safety Services modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated worksite model data and operational tasks to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety-related alerts to Safety Services module.

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes telemetry acquisition, processing, and distribution, minimizing diffusion.
Primarily data source; limited containment of update logic.
Consumes updated data but does not contain update logic.
Receives alerts but does not perform update processing.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning update latency functionality to NGHE Solution module centralizes processing and minimizes diffusion, supporting timeliness and safety.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module is overloaded.
Dependency on network link reliability for timely data flow.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate load balancing and redundancy within NGHE Solution; monitor network link health.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well decomposed and mapped to logically distinct DPs with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as update logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed end-to-end by measuring update latency and data accuracy at NGHE Solution interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor network link reliability and consider fallback mechanisms.
Plan for scalability in NGHE Solution to handle peak data loads.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and verification feasibility.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Acquire real-time telemetry data from vehicles and sensors within the worksite.
FR2: Process and integrate telemetry data to update the worksite model accurately and efficiently.
FR3: Distribute updated worksite model data to relevant modules and stakeholders within the required latency.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry data availability and network reliability.
Processing capacity within NGHE Solution module.
open_risks: Network link failures impacting update latency.
Potential processing bottlenecks under high data volume.
evidence_needed: Load testing results for NGHE Solution processing.
